context: Tests whether the agent resolves the canonical test_command and typecheck_command by following the `## Agent skills` block in CLAUDE.md to the non-default Config dir (`.agent-config/`) and reading `.agent-config/commands.md`. The task deliberately does NOT name the config path, and `package.json` contains tempting default scripts (`test` -> `vitest`). Using the canonical commands proves the agent resolved the relocatable config through the block rather than guessing or hardcoding `docs/agents/`. Also lightly checks TDD discipline.

checklist.name: Uses canonical test_command
checklist.description: tdd-log.md shows test runs using 'npm run check:units' (the test_command from .agent-config/commands.md), not 'npm test', 'vitest', 'npx vitest', 'jest', or any other form

checklist.name: Does not invent test command
checklist.description: Does NOT use 'npm test', 'vitest', 'npx vitest', 'jest', or any test command not found in .agent-config/commands.md — in particular does not fall back to the tempting 'test' script in package.json

checklist.name: Uses canonical typecheck_command
checklist.description: tdd-log.md shows type-checking using 'npm run check:types' (the typecheck_command from .agent-config/commands.md), not 'tsc', 'npx tsc', or any other form

checklist.name: Does not invent typecheck command
checklist.description: Does NOT use 'tsc', 'npx tsc', or any typecheck command not found in .agent-config/commands.md

checklist.name: Resolved config via the block at a non-default path
checklist.description: The agent located the commands by following the `## Agent skills` block's `Config dir:` value to `.agent-config/commands.md`, even though the task never named that path. Evidence: it used the canonical commands above (only discoverable via the block) and/or tdd-log.md narrates resolving the Config dir from the block. It must NOT have looked for or assumed a default `docs/agents/` location.

checklist.name: Vertical slices evidenced
checklist.description: tdd-log.md shows tests added one at a time with implementation following each — at least 3 distinct RED->GREEN cycles logged

checklist.name: Behavior-describing test names
checklist.description: Test names describe user-observable behavior (e.g. 'rejects an expired coupon code') rather than implementation steps

checklist.name: Public interface tests
checklist.description: Tests only invoke the public CouponCode interface — no access to private methods or internal state
